title: Multi-agent stock analysis (fundamental + technical)
summary: Chat workflow with an orchestrator agent that delegates to specialized agents for fundamental and technical analysis, each using Gemini search tools, then merges results. Includes email output via Gmail.
integrations: Google Gemini (PaLM) API — multiple chat models for orchestrator and sub-agents
Gemini Search tools — research before answering
Gmail — send structured analysis by email
credentials_required: Gmail OAuth2 or Google API access for Gmail node
notes: Sub-agents are wired as tools under the orchestrator; re-map credentials and Gmail sender after import.
